name: 24 Hour Cabbage Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage, onion, and carrot finely.
2. In a bowl, alternate layers of shredded cabbage, onion, and carrot.
3. Sprinkle 1 cup of sugar over the layered vegetables.
4. Add vinegar, salad oil, celery seed, dry mustard, salt, and the remaining tablespoon of sugar to the bowl.
5. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Pour the mixture over the cabbage slowly while stirring continuously.
7. Refrigerate for 24 hours. You may also add green bell pepper and/or a rib of celery thinly sliced.
8. Before serving, stir the slaw well. The flavor will improve each day.
